raw: {"perspective": "Communications Strategist", "findings": [{"severity": "high", "file_or_area": "memory/atlas/identity.md", "issue": "Ambiguous role definition may lead to inconsistent application of Constitution principles", "recommended_fix": "Clarify and emphasize Atlas' role as the project itself, not a role inside the project, in all relevant documentation and communication"}, {"severity": "medium", "file_or_area": "docs/ECOSYSTEM-CONSTITUTION.md", "issue": "Potential for inconsistent application of Crystal Laws across products", "recommended_fix": "Conduct a thorough review of each product's implementation of Crystal Laws to ensure consistency and adherence to the Constitution"}], "overall_verdict": "warn", "whistleblower_flag": null}

findings.issue: Ambiguous role definition may lead to inconsistent application of Constitution principles
findings.recommended_fix: Clarify and emphasize Atlas' role as the project itself, not a role inside the project, in all relevant documentation and communication

findings.issue: Potential for inconsistent application of Crystal Laws across products
findings.recommended_fix: Conduct a thorough review of each product's implementation of Crystal Laws to ensure consistency and adherence to the Constitution
